outlook_paragraph: Matador Resources maintains full exposure to the Permian Basin with stable drilling activity, showing 13 active sites at decision date and a positive relative activity delta of +2.2, driven by three newly active pads. With WTI averaging around $80.40 and realized prices at a slight discount, production levels support a deterministic revenue forecast of approximately $843.3 million for Q2 2024. The concentration of continuous activity on 10 pads indicates sustained operational focus, contributing to predictable output growth.
